title: Lack of cores in Lilith and Lilith based lifeforms solved
display_title: Lack of cores in Lilith and Lilith based lifeforms solved
wikitext: []: Lack of cores in Lilith and Lilith-based lifeforms solved?             Quote Post by Electreel » Mon Dec 31, 2012 10:57 pm Hi everyone! I´m a new member of this forum, though I have been visiting it for a very long time. I´d like to introduce an idea of mine. Some time ago I read Reichu´s interesting theory about the Dirac Sea being an analogue of "Paradise" in the NGE´s universe and its correlation with the cores present on the angels and EVAs http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6431/EoE-Instrumentality-101/20/? http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6431/EoE-Instrumentality-101/40/? Now, in Jewish folklore Lilith leaves Paradise after being forced to abide both Adam´s and God´s orders. If we take into account Reichu´s theory, could this be the reason why Lilith and Lilim lack cores? While I don´t think this quite relevant since NGE´s universe is just a mash-up of different religious references, I would like to know your opinion. I´m sorry if this topic has already been brought up or if it doesn´t make any sense at all.

[]: Lack of cores in Lilith and Lilith-based lifeforms solved?             Quote Post by Electreel » Mon Dec 31, 2012 10:57 pm Hi everyone! I´m a new member of this forum, though I have been visiting it for a very long time. I´d like to introduce an idea of mine. Some time ago I read Reichu´s interesting theory about the Dirac Sea being an analogue of "Paradise" in the NGE´s universe and its correlation with the cores present on the angels and EVAs http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6431/EoE-Instrumentality-101/20/? http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/6431/EoE-Instrumentality-101/40/? Now, in Jewish folklore Lilith leaves Paradise after being forced to abide both Adam´s and God´s orders. If we take into account Reichu´s theory, could this be the reason why Lilith and Lilim lack cores? While I don´t think this quite relevant since NGE´s universe is just a mash-up of different religious references, I would like to know your opinion. I´m sorry if this topic has already been brought up or if it doesn´t make any sense at all.
